mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.onboarding_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, onboarding_id, supplier_id, applicant_name, business_name, business_type, documents_json, verification_notes, training_progress, training_completed_modules_json, resubmission_count, rejection_reason, state_id, flow_id, submitted_at, created_time, last_modified_time ) SELECT ob.id, ob.tenant, NOW(), ob.id, ob.supplier_id, ob.applicant_name, ob.business_name, ob.business_type, ob.documents_json, ob.verification_notes, ob.training_progress, ob.training_completed_modules_json, ob.resubmission_count, ob.rejection_reason, ob.state_id, ob.flow_id, ob.submitted_at, ob.created_time, ob.last_modified_time FROM hm_onboarding.supplier_onboarding ob
